comments.text: "🚨🚨🚨🚨🚨DONT BUY ICICI LOMBARD HEALTH INSURANCE "📢⚠️🚨 Hi friends, Here i would like to mention about the claim that i requested from ICICI lombard. Brief summary -: we got our policy ported from Niva bupa to ICICI as they guarenteed hassle free claim processing however situation was totally different. 1) Their investigator came at our house who was polite and humble but he snatched documents from my mother,s hand though she was denying. 2) They gave claim rejection reason that no documents were submitted before date 23 juky 2023 however treatment itself got started on 4th may 2024 AND THEY ARE ASKING FOR DOCUMENTS THAT NEVER EXISTED SO HOW CAN WE PROVIDE. 3) situation was that my mother once had knee pain and hand numbmess for which she got treated from PGI and it was only 1 week treatment and reason was due to vitamin B deficiency ( already submitted all documents ) 4) Comlany is rejecting claim because  that my mother visited on 4th may 2024 to doctor and when doctor asked did You faced that problem and my mom replied yes might. be 1.5 years back it was first she faced that problem and then again it was normal and now the situation worsened so i came to got checked. 5) Problem was diagnosed on 6th may 2024 by an ultrasound conducted as prescribed by PgI doctors. 6) Now it is very lame to ask documents before that date and they are rejecting claim on that basis which is similarly like you are pregnant for 9 months and they are asking pregnancy reports before 12 months literally shit claims they are providing. ICICI Lombard ICICI Lombard ICICI LOMBARD GENERAL INSURANCE Icici Lombard
